Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 The unitors for composition of enriched profunctors

 In this file, we define the unitors for composition of enriched profunctors. All the
 constructions and proofs boil down to calculations with coends. To construct the desired
 morphisms, we use the mapping property and to prove the necessary laws, we use the
 uniqueness of such morphisms.

 Content
 1. The left unitor
 1.1. The morphism of the left unitor
 1.2. Naturality of the left unitor
 1.3. The left unitor as a transformation
 1.4. The inverse of the left unitor
 2. The right unitor
 2.1. The morphism of the right unitor
 2.2. Naturality of the right unitor
 2.3. The right unitor as a transformation
 2.4. The inverse of the right unitor

 ******************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coends.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.BenabouCosmos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Profunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.StandardProfunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorSquares.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Invertible.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.CompositionProf.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

Section Unitors.
  Context {V : benabou_cosmos}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
          (P : E₁ ↛e E₂).

  (** * 1. The left unitor *)

  (** ** 1.1. The morphism of the left unitor *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x', x'': C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₁ x' x'' x) #⊗ identity (P y x')
· rmap_e P y x' x =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
    (P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
· rmap_e P y x'' x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x', x'': C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₁ x' x'' x) #⊗ identity (P y x')
· rmap_e P y x' x =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
    (P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
· rmap_e P y x'' x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x', x'': C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x')
· enriched_comp E₁ x' x'' x #⊗ identity (P y x')
· rmap_e P y x' x =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
    (P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
· rmap_e P y x'' x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x', x'': C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x')
· (enriched_comp E₁ x' x'' x #⊗ identity (P y x')
   · rmap_e P y x' x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x')
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
     (P y x')
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
      · rmap_e P y x'' x))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x', x'': C₁
enriched_comp E₁ x' x'' x #⊗ identity (P y x')
· rmap_e P y x' x =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
  (P y x')
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
   · rmap_e P y x'' x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x', x'': C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
  (P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
· rmap_e P y x'' x =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
  (P y x')
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
   · rmap_e P y x'' x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x', x'': C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
  (P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
· rmap_e P y x'' x =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
  (P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
· rmap_e P y x'' x

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) P

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) P

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
V
⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x, P y x ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y0 : C₁,
V ⟦ identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ y0 x ⊗ P y y0,
P y x ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₁,
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) y₂ y₁ x
#⊗ identity (P y y₁) · ?fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (P y y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ y₂ x)
    (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y y₁)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ y₂ x)
  #⊗ rmap_e P y y₁ y₂ · ?fs y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y0 : C₁,
V ⟦ identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ y0 x ⊗ P y y0,
P y x ⟧
 exact (λ x', rmap_e P _ _ _).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₁,
lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) y₂ y₁ x
#⊗ identity (P y y₁) · (λ x' : C₁, rmap_e P y x' x) y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (P y y₁)
· mon_lassociator
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ y₂ x)
    (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y y₁)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ y₂ x)
  #⊗ rmap_e P y y₁ y₂
· (λ x' : C₁, rmap_e P y x' x) y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x', x'': C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₁ x' x'' x) #⊗ identity (P y x')
· rmap_e P y x' x =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P y x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x'' ⦄)
    (P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x'', x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x''
· rmap_e P y x'' x

      exact (lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_eq y x x' x'').
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x₂ x₁
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂ =
rmap_e P y x₁ x₂

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x₂ x₁
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂ =
rmap_e P y x₁ x₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x₂ x₁
· from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x₂
    (λ x' : C₁, rmap_e P y x' x₂)
    (λ x' x'' : C₁,
     lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_eq y x₂ x' x'') =
rmap_e P y x₁ x₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ = rmap_e P y x₁ x₂

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** 1.2. Naturality of the left unitor *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) x₁ x₂ y
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) x y₁ y₂
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) x₁ x₂ y
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x: C₁
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) =
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
   · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y : C₁,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
     · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x y
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
     · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
     · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
     · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
     · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
     · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂
               x)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
      · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂
               x)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
      · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x' #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
     · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x' #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
     · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
     · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
#⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
     · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x) =
identity
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
#⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
     · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
     · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
#⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
         · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x))) =
identity
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
#⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁
              y₂ x
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
              ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P
                   y₂ x)
            · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
                    P y₂ x)
               · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)))
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂
                x)
         · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P
                 y₂ x)
            · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)))
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
         · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x))
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁
              y₂ x
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
              ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P
                   y₂ x)
            · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
                    P y₂ x)
               · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x))))
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₂ x))

x, x': C₁
a: V

identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in

   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap

         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)))

identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category

x, x': C₁
a: V

?b =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x

         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)))

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
    · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x' x
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x = ?b

        apply rmap_e_lmap_e.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
· rmap_e P y₂ x' x =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x))) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
· rmap_e P y₂ x' x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
· rmap_e P y₂ x' x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
      · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x)) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
   · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ x x'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x) = 
?y'

        apply comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
     (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x x'
   · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
· rmap_e P y₂ x' x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x x'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
· rmap_e P y₂ x' x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x'))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x x'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
· rmap_e P y₂ x' x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₁ y₂ x x'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
· rmap_e P y₂ x' x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x x'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
· rmap_e P y₂ x' x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
     (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x')
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y₂ x x'
         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x))) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x')
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
         · rmap_e P y₂ x' x)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
     (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x') · rmap_e P y₂ x' x)) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x')
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
         · rmap_e P y₂ x' x)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
     (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
      · identity
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
        #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x' · rmap_e P y₂ x' x)) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x')
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
         · rmap_e P y₂ x' x)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
  #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x' · rmap_e P y₂ x' x =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x'
· rmap_e P y₂ x' x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
     (P y₁ x')
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x')
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y₁ x')
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
       (P y₁ x'))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
     (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
     (P y₁ x')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x')
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y₁ x')
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x')
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x')
               · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
                   (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x'))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
     (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
     (P y₁ x')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x')
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y₁ x')
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x')
                 (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
            · identity
                ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
                 ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x'))))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
     (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   · identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
     (P y₁ x')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x')
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y₁ x')
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         · identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x')
                (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  (P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
    (P y₁ x')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) =
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x'))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x')
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y₁ x')
    (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x') (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) x y₁ y₂
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
   · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) =
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
   · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
∏ y : C₁,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
     · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
     · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
     · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
     · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
      · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x
               y₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
      · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂)

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
#⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
     · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂) =
identity
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
#⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
     · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
     · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
#⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
         · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂))) =
identity
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
#⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁
              y₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P
                   x y₂)
            · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
                    P x y₂)
               · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)))
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂)))

x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
      · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x
                y₂)
         · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x
                 y₂)
            · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁)
        (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
         · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁)
        (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁
              y₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P
                   x y₂)
            · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
                    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁)
                    P x y₂)
               · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂))))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x y₂))

· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
   · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
   · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) = ?b

x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
    · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁)
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x x' y₁
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ = ?b

        apply rmap_e_rmap_e.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
· rmap_e P x x' y₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
         · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂))) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
· rmap_e P x x' y₂

  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap

#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂ = ?b

y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
      · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)) = ?b

y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
   · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂)
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ x'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂) = 
?y'

        apply comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
     (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂ x'
   · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
· rmap_e P x x' y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x')
    (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂ x'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
· rmap_e P x x' y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁ ⊗ P x x'))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂ x'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
· rmap_e P x x' y₂

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₁ y₂ x'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
· rmap_e P x x' y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁) (P x x')
· rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x' y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity (P x x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂ x'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
· rmap_e P x x' y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁) (P x x')
· (rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x' y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x x')
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P x y₂ x'
      · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂)) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· (enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
   · rmap_e P x x' y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' y₁) (P x x')
· (rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x' y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x x') · rmap_e P x x' y₂) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· (enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
   · rmap_e P x x' y₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, x': C₁
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· (enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
   · rmap_e P x x' y₂) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x', y₁ ⦄)
  (P x x')
· (enriched_comp E₁ x' y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity (P x x')
   · rmap_e P x x' y₂)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** 1.3. The left unitor as a transformation *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) P

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) P

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) P
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) P
 exact lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor
 exact lunitor_enriched_profunctor_laws.
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) P

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) P

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P) P

    exact lunitor_enriched_profunctor.
  Defined.

  (** ** 1.4. The inverse of the left unitor *)
  Definition linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (y : C₂)
             (x : C₁)
    : P y x
      -->
      comp_enriched_profunctor (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x
    := mon_linvunitor _
       · (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity _)
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_in (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat (lunitor_enriched_profunctor y x)
  (linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat (lunitor_enriched_profunctor y x)
  (linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
lunitor_enriched_profunctor y x
· linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x)
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor y x = identity (P y x)

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

lunitor_enriched_profunctor y x
· linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x)

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂

lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y0 : C₁,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x y0
· (lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
   · linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x y0
· identity
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x)

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'
· (lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
   · linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'
· identity
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x)

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'
· identity
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
rmap_e P y x' x
· linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'
· identity
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x)

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'

rmap_e P y x' x
· (mon_linvunitor (P y x)
   · enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'

· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x
· enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x = ?b

   · (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)

· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in

· (enriched_id E₁ x
   #⊗ identity

   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x' x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x = ?t2

        apply (comp_enriched_profunctor_comm' (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P).
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y x')
· (enriched_id E₁ x
   #⊗ identity
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x' x ⊗ P y x')
   · (identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x x)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
      · mon_rassociator
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x x)
          (P y x') (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x x
           ⊗ P y x') (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁ x x)
          (P y x')
      · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) x x'
          x #⊗ identity (P y x')
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x')) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· (enriched_id E₁ x
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
      · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
          (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
      · sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
          (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
      · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
          (P y x')
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x)
        #⊗ identity (P y x')
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x')) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· enriched_id E₁ x
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x) #⊗ identity (P y x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x' =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· enriched_id E₁ x
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x) #⊗ identity (P y x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x' =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· enriched_id E₁ x
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· enriched_id E₁ x
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
?b = identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· enriched_id E₁ x
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· (enriched_id E₁ x
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
      #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
           (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V
              ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x') (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
            · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
                 (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
                    (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
                  · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x)
                 #⊗ identity (P y x')))))) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

y: C₂

· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
        (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
           (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
                 (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x)
              #⊗ identity (P y x'))))) = ?t2
