V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
· enriched_id E₁ x
  #⊗ identity (P y x' ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
· (enriched_id E₁ x
   #⊗ identity (P y x' ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
        (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
           (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
                 (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x)
              #⊗ identity (P y x'))))) = ?t2

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x' ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
     (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
        (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
           (P y x')
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x)
           #⊗ identity (P y x')))) = ?t2

y: C₂
x, x': C₁
enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x' ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
enriched_id E₁ x
#⊗ (identity (P y x') #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) (P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x') (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x'))
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
    (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
    (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
?t2

· ((enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x'))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
        (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
           (P y x')
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
              (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) · enriched_comp E₁ x' x x)
           #⊗ identity (P y x')))) = ?t2

· (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)

· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

· identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x'))

    (P y x')

· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x'))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
 · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
   · (mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x') (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x')
           (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
         · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
              (P y x')
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
                 I_{ V} · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄))
              #⊗ identity (P y x'))))) =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) (P y x')
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (P y x') (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x') (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
   · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x')
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
         · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (P y x'))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x')
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
      · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄))
     #⊗ identity (P y x')) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x')
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
   · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V} ⊗ P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
   · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
 · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
   · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
(mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
 · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
    · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)))
#⊗ identity (P y x') =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
(mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) I_{ V}
 · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
(mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)
 · mon_lunitor (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x, x': C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x') =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x', x ⦄) ⊗ P y x')

      apply tensor_id_id.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor y x = identity (P y x)
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity (P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity (P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x
      · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)) =
identity (P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x
      · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
?b = identity (P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x
      · lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x x
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x = ?t2

        apply lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · rmap_e P y x x) = identity (P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P y x) · mon_lunitor (P y x) =
identity (P y x)

      apply mon_linvunitor_lunitor.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
is_iso_enriched_profunctor_transformation
  lunitor_enriched_profunctor

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
is_iso_enriched_profunctor_transformation
  lunitor_enriched_profunctor

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism (lunitor_enriched_profunctor y x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
V ⟦ P y x,
comp_enriched_profunctor
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat (lunitor_enriched_profunctor y x)
  ?g

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
V ⟦ P y x,
comp_enriched_profunctor
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P y x ⟧
 exact (linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat (lunitor_enriched_profunctor y x)
  (linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)
 exact (is_inverse_linvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x).
  Defined.

  Definition linvunitor_enriched_profunctor
    : enriched_profunctor_transformation
        P
        (comp_enriched_profunctor (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P)
    := inv_enriched_profunctor_transformation
         _
         is_iso_lunitor_enriched_profunctor.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₁) P)

    exact linvunitor_enriched_profunctor.
  Defined.

  (** * 2. The right unitor *)

  (** ** 2.1. The morphism of the right unitor *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
lmap_e P y'' y' x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · lmap_e P y' y x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
   · lmap_e P y'' y x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
lmap_e P y'' y' x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · lmap_e P y' y x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
   · lmap_e P y'' y x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
lmap_e P y'' y' x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· lmap_e P y' y x =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
· lmap_e P y'' y x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y'' y' x
· lmap_e P y' y x =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
· lmap_e P y'' y x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y'' y' x
   · lmap_e P y' y x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · (identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
         · lmap_e P y'' y x)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · (identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
         · lmap_e P y'' y x))) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y'' y' x
   · lmap_e P y' y x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · (identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
         · lmap_e P y'' y x))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y'' y' x
   · lmap_e P y' y x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · (identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
         · lmap_e P y'' y x))) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
   · lmap_e P y'' y x) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
· lmap_e P y'' y x = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₂ y y' y'' #⊗ identity (P y'' x)
· lmap_e P y'' y x = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E₂ y y' y'' #⊗ identity (P y'' x)
   · lmap_e P y'' y x) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y'' x)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
       (P y'' x)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y'' y' x
   · lmap_e P y' y x) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
        ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y'' x)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
             (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y'' y' x · lmap_e P y' y x))) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y'' y' x
   · lmap_e P y' y x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y'' x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (P y'' x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y'' y' x
· lmap_e P y' y x =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y'' y' x
· lmap_e P y' y x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y'' x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (P y'' x) =
sym_mon_braiding V ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)


    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y'' x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (P y'' x) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y'' x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (P y'' x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· identity
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y'' x)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
       (P y'' x)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
?b =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
        ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (P y'' x))) = ?b

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
       (P y'' x)) = ?t2

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y'' x) = ?t2

      apply sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
       (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) ⊗ P y'' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y, y', y'': C₂
x: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) P

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) P

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
V
⟦ comp_enriched_profunctor P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x, P y x ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y0 : C₂,
V ⟦ P y0 x ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y0,
P y x ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x
#⊗ identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y₁)
· ?fs y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y y₁ y₂
· ?fs y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y0 : C₂,
V ⟦ P y0 x ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y0,
P y x ⟧
 refine (λ y', sym_mon_braiding _ _ _ · lmap_e P _ _ _).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y₁ y₂ : C₂,
lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x
#⊗ identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y₁)
· (λ y' : C₂,
   sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · lmap_e P y' y x) y₁ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x)
#⊗ identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P y₂ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y₁)
· identity (P y₂ x)
  #⊗ rmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y y₁ y₂
· (λ y' : C₂,
   sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · lmap_e P y' y x) y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
y', y'': C₂
lmap_e P y'' y' x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · lmap_e P y' y x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄) (P y'' x)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y'' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (P y'' x) #⊗ enriched_comp E₂ y y' y''
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y'' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y'' ⦄)
   · lmap_e P y'' y x)

      exact (runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_eq y y' y'' x).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y₂ x y₁
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y₂ x y₁
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y₂ x =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y₂ x y₁
· from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y₂ x
    (λ y' : C₂,
     sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y' ⦄)
     · lmap_e P y' y₂ x)
    (λ y' y'' : C₂,
     runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_eq y₂ y' y'' x) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y₁, y₂: C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y₁ x) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** 2.2. Naturality of the right unitor *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x₁ x₂ y
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x y₁ y₂
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =
lmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x₁ x₂ y
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) =
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
∏ y0 : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y0
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
     · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y0
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
     · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
     · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
     · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
     · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
     · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
               (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
               (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y' #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
     · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y' #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
     · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
     · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
#⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
     · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y) =
identity
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
#⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· internal_transpose
    (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
     · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
     · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
     · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
#⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
         · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y))) =
identity
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
#⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂
              y
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
                   x₂ y)
            · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
                    x₂ y)
               · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)))
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose
     (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂
                 y)
            · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)))
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
         · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y))
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂
              y
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
                   x₂ y)
            · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
                    x₂ y)
               · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y))))
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₂ y))

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y)
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y)
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂
                 y)
            · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
  (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
  (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y

  (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)

        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)

· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P

   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)

           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)

x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P

   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)))

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) = ?b

x₁, x₂: C₂

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
    · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    · lmap_e P y' x₁ y) · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    · lmap_e P y' x₁ y) · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y' x₁ y
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y' x₁ y
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)
   · lmap_e P y' x₂ y) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y))) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)
   · lmap_e P y' x₂ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
      · (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)
   · lmap_e P y' x₂ y)

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P

         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y))) =

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

x₁, x₂: C₂

y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)

x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y) = ?t2

x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ y y'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y) = ?y'

        apply comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y y'
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)
   · lmap_e P y' x₂ y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y y'
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
      · (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y'
         #⊗ identity (P y' y) · lmap_e P y' x₂ y)))

  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')

   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y y'

#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)

  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
  (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_lmap_mor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂ y y'
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
  (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
   · mon_lassociator (P y' y)
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
       (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · identity (P y' y)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
           (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁
             x₂ y')
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y y'
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
  (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· mon_lassociator (P y' y)
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y' y)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
        (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂
          y')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y y'
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y'
   ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y' y)
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y' y)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
        (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂
          y')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y y'
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y' y)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
  (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y' y)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
        (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂
          y')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y y'
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (P y' y)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
  (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· (identity (P y' y)
   #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
         (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁
           x₂ y')
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y y'
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₂ y y'
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x₂ y = ?t2

        apply from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· (mon_lassociator (P y' y)
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (P y' y)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
            (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
              x₁ x₂ y')
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y' ⦄)
         · lmap_e P y' x₂ y))) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
      · (enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y'
         #⊗ identity (P y' y) · lmap_e P y' x₂ y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· mon_lassociator (P y' y)
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y' y)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
        (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂
          y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y' ⦄)
· lmap_e P y' x₂ y =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (P y' y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' y)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)
· lmap_e P y' x₂ y

      
V: benabou_cosmos

x₁, x₂: C₂

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· mon_lassociator (P y' y)
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· identity (P y' y)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
        (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
      · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁ x₂
          y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y' ⦄) =

#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (P y' y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' y)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· (mon_lassociator (P y' y)
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (identity (P y' y)
      #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
            (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
              x₁ x₂ y')
      · sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, y' ⦄))) =

#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
