   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
      · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
· (mon_lassociator (P y' y)
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y)
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y'
         ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ x₁ y')
           (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         · lmap_e (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) x₁
             x₂ y') #⊗ identity (P y' y))) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
      · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y'))
        #⊗ identity (P y' y))) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
      · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y)
        ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
            · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y'
              #⊗ identity (P y' y))))) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' y)
      · enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' y)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (P y' y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' y)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₂ x₁ y' #⊗ identity (P y' y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' y) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (P y' y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y' y)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P y' y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
       (P y' y)) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (P y' y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P y' y)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y' y)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P y' y)
       (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
       (P y' y)) =
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
       (P y' y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P y' y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y' y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P y' y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (P y' y) =
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (P y' y)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P y' y) (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' y)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P y' y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y' y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P y' y)
    (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄) =
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (P y' y ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₁, y' ⦄)))

      (** This makes the goal more readable *)
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
∏ o o0 o1 : V,
sym_mon_braiding V o (o0 ⊗ o1)
· mon_lassociator o0 o1 o
· sym_mon_braiding V o0 (o1 ⊗ o)
· mon_lassociator o1 o o0
· sym_mon_braiding V o1 (o ⊗ o0)
· mon_lassociator o o0 o1 = identity (o ⊗ (o0 ⊗ o1))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ (v₂ ⊗ v₃)
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ = identity (v₁ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₃))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ · mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ = identity (v₁ ⊗ (v₂ ⊗ v₃))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
· mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ · mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ =
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ · mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃
· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
   · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
      · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
         · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
            · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
               · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
                  · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
                     · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃
                          (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
                        · mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)))))))) =
mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ · mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
               · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
                     · mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃))))))) =
mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
               · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
                     · mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃))))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
?b = mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁

a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
         · (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
            · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
               · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
                  · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
                     · mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃))))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
      · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
            · mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
mon_rassociator v₂ v₃ v₁ · mon_lassociator v₂ v₃ v₁
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
identity (v₂ ⊗ (v₃ ⊗ v₁))
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃ = ?t2

        apply idpath.

· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
         · mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂

· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
         · mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
         · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ (v₁ ⊗ v₂)
         · mon_lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃))) =

· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃

y: C₁
y': C₂

· mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
· identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
· mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
· (mon_rassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
   · sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
   · mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
   · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂
   · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃) =
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)

x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ #⊗ identity v₃
· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
         · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
            · (mon_rassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
               · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁
                  #⊗ identity v₂
                  · (mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
                     · (identity v₁
                        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂
                        · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)))))))) =
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)

· (mon_lassociator v₂ v₁ v₃
   · (identity v₂ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)

· (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₃ ⊗ v₁)
   · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
      · (mon_rassociator v₃ v₁ v₂

· sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂

· (sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
   · (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
      · (mon_rassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
            · (mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
   · (mon_rassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · (mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
            · (identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂
               · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃))))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₃ #⊗ identity v₂
· (mon_lassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
   · (mon_rassociator v₃ v₁ v₂
      · (sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
         · (mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
            · (identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂
               · mon_rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃))))) = ?b

· sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₁ #⊗ identity v₂
· mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂

   · (sym_mon_braiding V v₂ (v₁ ⊗ v₃)
      · (mon_lassociator v₁ v₃ v₂
         · identity v₁ #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V v₃ v₂

· identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃) = ?t2

        apply id_right.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V

· sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁ #⊗ identity v₃ =
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
(sym_mon_braiding V v₁ v₂ · sym_mon_braiding V v₂ v₁)
#⊗ identity v₃ = identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⟧
v₁, v₂, v₃: V
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂) #⊗ identity v₃ =
identity (v₁ ⊗ v₂ ⊗ v₃)

      apply tensor_id_id.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₁
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) x y₁ y₂
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor x y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) =
internal_transpose
  (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y0
· internal_transpose

     #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁

          ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P

         (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
            (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
     · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₂) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P

           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
               (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₂)

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
#⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁
         · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₂))) =
identity
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
#⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁
              x₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y
                   x₂)
            · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)
                    y x₂)
               · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)))
      #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₂)))

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose

   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₂)) =

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (internal_transpose

      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P

            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P

              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P

   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁
         · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂))

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁
              x₂
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y

               · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂))))
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y x₂))

y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
            ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
         · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y
                 x₂)
            · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P

   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P

         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos

y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

#⊗ (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
    · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    · lmap_e P y' y x₁) · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    · lmap_e P y' y x₁) · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y' y x₁
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y' y x₁
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y' x₁)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
   · lmap_e P y' y x₂) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y' x₁)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
   · lmap_e P y' y x₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos

y: C₂

y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y' x₁)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
   · lmap_e P y' y x₂)

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P

  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂ = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
      (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂)
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ y'
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· internal_eval (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂) = ?y'

        apply comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂ y'
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y' x₁)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
   · lmap_e P y' y x₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂ y'
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
            #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂ · lmap_e P y' y x₂))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂ y'
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
            #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂ · lmap_e P y' y x₂))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos

x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂ y'
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂)) = ?b

y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_rmap_mor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₁ x₂ y'
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
   · rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
     #⊗ identity
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂ y'
   · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
  (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
   · (rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
      #⊗ identity
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂ y'
         · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x₂ y'
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x₂ = ?t2

        apply from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
      · (rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
         #⊗ identity
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₂)
              (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) · lmap_e P y' y x₂)))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
            #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂ · lmap_e P y' y x₂))))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
  #⊗ identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₂) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· lmap_e P y' y x₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
· lmap_e P y' y x₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
  #⊗ identity (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₂) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
      · (rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂
         #⊗ identity
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
         · sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₂) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P y' x₁ ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
         · identity
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y')
           #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
     (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
        (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V
           ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
     (P y' x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  (P y' x₁ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄))
    (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (P y' x₁ ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y' x₁ x₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (P y' x₁) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y' x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y' x₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y' x₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (P y' x₁)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
   · identity
       ((E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y': C₂
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄) =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y' x₁)
  (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y' x₁)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y' ⦄)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** 2.3. The right unitor as a transformation *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) P

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) P

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) P
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws ?τ

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) P
 exact runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor
 exact runitor_enriched_profunctor_laws.
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) P

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) P

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) P

    exact runitor_enriched_profunctor.
  Defined.

  (** ** 2.4. The inverse of the right unitor *)
  Definition rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (y : C₂)
             (x : C₁)
    : P y x --> comp_enriched_profunctor P (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x
    := mon_rinvunitor _
       · (identity _ #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y)
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat (runitor_enriched_profunctor y x)
  (rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat (runitor_enriched_profunctor y x)
  (rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
runitor_enriched_profunctor y x
· rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x)
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· runitor_enriched_profunctor y x = identity (P y x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
runitor_enriched_profunctor y x
· rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x)
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
∏ y0 : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y0
· (runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
   · rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y0
· identity
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'
· (runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
   · rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'
· identity
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'
· identity
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· lmap_e P x' y x
· rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'
· identity
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· lmap_e P x' y x
· rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· lmap_e P x' y x
· (mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
   · identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· lmap_e P x' y x
· (mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
   · identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· lmap_e P x' y x
· (mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
   · identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y) = 
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (lmap_e P x' y x
   · (mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
      · (identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
lmap_e P x' y x
· (mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
   · (identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y)) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
lmap_e P x' y x · mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
· identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
· lmap_e P x' y x #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y = ?t2

· (lmap_e P x' y x #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y)) =
?t2

· (identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y) = 
?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂

· identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y = ?t2

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· lmap_e P x' y x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
      #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
      · lmap_e P x' y x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
      #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
      · (lmap_e P x' y x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
      #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
      · (lmap_e P x' y x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y))) =
?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁

?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
      #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
      · (lmap_e P x' y x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
lmap_e P x' y x #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y = ?t2

        apply (comp_enriched_profunctor_comm P (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)).
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
      #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y)
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
             (P x' x
              ⊗ identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y)
         · mon_lassociator (P x' x)
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y)
             (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
         · identity (P x' x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y y)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
               · rmap_e
                   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y
                   y x')
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
      #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
           (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
             (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
         · mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
             (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
         · identity (P x' x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E₂ y y x')
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x' =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x')
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x' =
identity (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x x'

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') =
identity (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
?b = identity (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
      #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
           (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
              (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
            · (mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
               · identity (P x' x)
                 #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
                       (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
                     · enriched_comp E₂ y y x')))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
        (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
      · (mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
         · identity (P x' x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E₂ y y x')))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x' x))
#⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V}
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
        (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
      · (mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
         · identity (P x' x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
                 (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
               · enriched_comp E₂ y y x')))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
     (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · identity (P x' x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) · enriched_comp E₂ y y x'))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x ⊗ I_{ V})
· (identity (P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y)
  #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x ⊗ I_{ V})
· ((identity (P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · identity (P x' x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) · enriched_comp E₂ y y x'))) =
?t2

x: C₁
x': C₂
(identity (P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
   · identity (P x' x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) · enriched_comp E₂ y y x')) =
?t2

x': C₂
(identity (P x' x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y)
#⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

x: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P x' x) I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (enriched_id E₂ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))
· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
mon_lassociator (P x' x) I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (identity (P x' x)
   #⊗ (enriched_id E₂ y #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))
   · identity (P x' x)
     #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) · enriched_comp E₂ y y x')) =
?t2

· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

    · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)

    · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P x' x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
    · enriched_comp E₂ y y x') = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P x' x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
       · enriched_comp E₂ y y x')) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P x' x)
#⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V}
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
           (P x' x ⊗ I_{ V})
         · (mon_lassociator (P x' x) I_{ V}
              (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
            · identity (P x' x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
                    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
                  · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)))))) =
identity (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) ⊗ P x' x)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V}
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
           (P x' x ⊗ I_{ V})
         · (mon_lassociator (P x' x) I_{ V}
              (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
            · identity (P x' x)
              #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
                    (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
                  · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)))))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
?b = identity (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))

   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V}

· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V}
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x ⊗ I_{ V})

· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V}
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x ⊗ I_{ V})
· mon_lassociator (P x' x) I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)

  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)

· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) I_{ V} = 
?y'

· identity (P x' x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)

x': C₂

#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
       · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P x' x)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P x' x)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
    · mon_runitor (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
identity (P x' x) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) = ?t2

        apply tensor_id_id.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x)
   · identity (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))) =
identity (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
x': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x' x) (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄) (P x' x) =
identity (P x' x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y, x' ⦄))

      apply sym_mon_braiding_inv.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· runitor_enriched_profunctor y x = identity (P y x)

y: C₂

rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity (P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
· identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x =
identity (P y x)

· (identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)) =
identity (P y x)

· (identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)) = ?b
