        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y
      · runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)) = ?b

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

x: C₁
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x y
· runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x = ?t2

        apply runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
· (identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
      · lmap_e P y y x)) = identity (P y x)

· (identity (P y x) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
      · lmap_e P y y x)) = ?b

· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)

sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) I_{ V}
· enriched_id E₂ y #⊗ identity (P y x)
· lmap_e P y y x = ?t2

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

y: C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) I_{ V}
· (enriched_id E₂ y #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · lmap_e P y y x) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) I_{ V}
· mon_lunitor (P y x) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) I_{ V}
   · mon_lunitor (P y x)) = identity (P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_rinvunitor (P y x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) I_{ V}
· mon_lunitor (P y x) = identity (P y x)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
mon_linvunitor (P y x) · mon_lunitor (P y x) =
identity (P y x)

      apply mon_linvunitor_lunitor.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
is_iso_enriched_profunctor_transformation
  runitor_enriched_profunctor

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
is_iso_enriched_profunctor_transformation
  runitor_enriched_profunctor

y: C₂
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism (runitor_enriched_profunctor y x)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
V ⟦ P y x,
comp_enriched_profunctor P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat (runitor_enriched_profunctor y x)
  ?g

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
V ⟦ P y x,
comp_enriched_profunctor P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y x ⟧
 exact (rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
y: C₂
x: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat (runitor_enriched_profunctor y x)
  (rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x)
 exact (is_inverse_rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor y x).
  Defined.

  Definition rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor
    : enriched_profunctor_transformation
        P
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
    := inv_enriched_profunctor_transformation
         _
         is_iso_runitor_enriched_profunctor.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_square (functor_id_enrichment E₁)
  (functor_id_enrichment E₂) P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))

    exact rinvunitor_enriched_profunctor.
  Defined.
End Unitors.
